title: Communauté de communes du Bocage et de l'Hallue
summary: The Communauté de communes du Bocage et de l'Hallue  is a former communauté de communes in the Somme département and in the  Picardie région of France. It was created in December 1999. It was merged into the new Communauté de communes du Territoire Nord Picardie in January 2017.
text:
The Communauté de communes du Bocage et de l'Hallue  is a former communauté de communes in the Somme département and in the  Picardie région of France. It was created in December 1999. It was merged into the new Communauté de communes du Territoire Nord Picardie in January 2017.

Composition
This Communauté de communes comprised 26 communes:
